title: Rebuild GAS lottery Telegram mini-app with wallet portfolio intake
summary: Build GAS lottery Telegram mini-app with wallet portfolio intake and token eligibility
build_location: TBD - Vlad to determine after audit and architecture confirmation
purpose: Rebuild GAS as Telegram mini-app that lets users connect wallet, detect eligible low-value tokens with real market/liquidity, estimate ticket buying power, and complete purchase through clean wallet execution flow
core_product_rule: Mini-app must surface ticket-buying power from supported low-value tokens that still have real market/liquidity. Wallet connection required for portfolio read and valuation, not just signing.
key_constraints: Do not treat old GAS files as current source of truth
Use legacy GAS materials as reference only
Do not assume internal embedded wallet flow is default
Do not assume all wallet operations inside Telegram webview
Token eligibility and valuation must be explicit, conservative, fail closed
architecture_stance: Telegram mini-app is primary product surface
Mini-app shows estimated ticket count from eligible holdings
Purchase intent and ticket issuance through backend truth
Wallet execution flow may hand off externally if needed
v1_scope: Wallet connect path for portfolio read
product_outputs: Connected wallet address visible in mini-app
Supported token list visible in mini-app
Estimated ticket count from eligible token value
Reason codes when tokens excluded or discounted
token_eligibility_requirements: Stale/missing pricing reduces value or excludes
non_goals: Vague all wallet assets count behavior
Complex swap routing across every chain
Internal wallet custody as mandatory default
execution_ownership_rule: Vlad is single build owner. Baby Vlad spawned by Vlad only under Vlad ownership. Baby Vlad acts as implementation support and review-support lens. JJ does not route directly to Baby Vlad as primary owner.
acceptance_criteria: Mini-app shows eligible token buying power
Explicit examples exist for: supported token counted, illiquid token excluded, stale pricing excluded or discounted, blocked/unsupported token excluded
Purchase intent flow documented or demonstrated
No implementation drift beyond approved V1 scope
required_proof: One artifact/screenshot/output showing: wallet connected, token balances scanned, eligible value, ticket estimate, exclusion reason codes
checkpoint_rule: Vlad must not disappear into broad rebuild mode. First checkpoint should be architecture + wallet-read proof, not full product completion. Baby Vlad may be spawned by Vlad to tighten implementation, tests, edge cases, and checkpoint reviewability before JJ review.
suggested_first_slice: Show buying power estimate from a controlled supported-token set
needs_jax: If token eligibility policy changes materially
status_expectation: Task begins QUEUED. Moves to RUNNING only after real proof: first file change, first architecture brief, first wallet read proof, or first checkpoint artifact.
next_action: Vlad to audit legacy materials, determine build location, produce first proof to move from QUEUED to running
